name: list_deployments
description: List recent deployments for a service, including status, timestamps, and deployment metadata.

parameters.name: query
parameters.example: query($serviceId: String!, $environmentId: String!) { deployments(first: 10, input: {serviceId: $serviceId, environmentId: $environmentId}) { edges { node { id status createdAt } } } }

parameters.name: variables
parameters.description: Service and environment IDs to filter deployments.

body.query: query($serviceId: String!, $environmentId: String!) { deployments(first: 10, input: {serviceId: $serviceId, environmentId: $environmentId}) { edges { node { id status createdAt } } } }
